narration: Ever wonder why we only hear what we want?

narration: Meet myside bias. It's when we favor our side's arguments, ignoring anything that contradicts them.
visual_description: Context visual: Meet myside bias. It's when we favor our side's arguments, ignoring anything that contradicts them.

narration: But wait! There's more. Confirmation bias is the sneaky cousin.

narration: It drives us to seek out evidence that confirms our beliefs. Both are traps.
